Our Space

THE FACILITY

01

Weight Room

Full dumbbell racks, barbells, benches, squat racks, and plate-loaded machines. Everything you need for serious strength training.

02

Cardio Floor

State-of-the-art treadmills, ellipticals, bikes, and rowers. Keep your heart rate up and the calories burning.

03

Group Studio

High-energy group classes from HIIT to yoga. Build community while you build strength in our dedicated studio space.

What We Offer

OUR PROGRAMS

Flexible membership plans with no long-term contracts. Month-to-month options for every budget and fitness level.

Get Started

One-on-one sessions with certified trainers who build custom programs tailored to your goals and abilities.

Get Started

High-energy group classes from HIIT to yoga. Build community while you build strength.

Get Started

State-of-the-art treadmills, ellipticals, bikes, and rowers to keep your heart pumping and calories burning.

Get Started

Full dumbbell racks, barbells, benches, and squat racks for serious strength training.

Get Started

Expert advice on fueling your body right. Meal planning support to complement your training program.

Get Started

Who We Are

YOUR
COMMUNITY
GYM

For over 26 years, Total Fitness of Columbus has been the go-to gym for people who are serious about their health. We are locally owned and operated, and we take pride in providing a clean, welcoming environment where every member feels at home.

Whether you are just getting started or training for your next competition, our certified trainers and top-tier equipment are here to help you reach your goals.

No long-term contracts Certified trainers Clean facility All fitness levels welcome Locally owned since 1998 Convenient Columbus location
